Bus Timings

8 Bus Schedule Al Baraha Bus Station to Ibn Battuta Bus Station

December 6, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Need to zip around Dubai on the cheap? Bus 8’s your go-to. This route’s a real champ, linking Al Baraha in Deira to Ibn Battuta near Jebel Ali. It hits all the hot spots - JBR, Palm Jumeirah, Wild Wadi - you name it. Whether you’re a local heading to work or a tourist on the hunt for some fun, Bus 8’s got you covered. It runs constantly, so no long waits. Plus, it’s way easier on your wallet than taxis or parking fees. Give it a shot next time you’re out exploring Dubai. You might just fall in love with the convenience!

Route Name 8
Route Description Al Baraha Bus Station - Ibn Battuta Bus Station · 1
Total Distance Approximately 36-40 km
Total Journey Time Approximately 1 hour 16 minutes
Operational Hours 04:25 to 21:35 (Depending on Starting Point)
Fare AED 5-12
Official Website Official Website

Download PDF Bus 8

Bus 8 Route in Dubai

Bus Timings

Bus 8 operates frequently throughout the day, allowing passengers to plan their trips with ease. Below are the bus timings:

Bus 8 Timetable

To view the full schedule, you can visit the official RTA website or follow this link for 8 Bus Timings.

Bus Ticket Price

The fare for Bus 8 follows the standard Dubai public transport pricing. A single journey typically costs AED 5-12 with a Nol Card, depending on the number of zones crossed. The price may vary based on the Nol Card type and travel zones. For the most accurate fare information, passengers should check the RTA Dubai app or inquire at metro stations. This cost-effective option ensures affordable travel across Dubai.

Bus Booking

Bus 8 does not offer online booking options. Passengers can simply board the bus at any of the designated stops along the route. This app is highly recommended for a hassle-free travel experience. Checking the app before traveling can help ensure a smooth and timely trip.

Bus Route

Below are the major stops along the Bus 8 route:

  1. Al Baraha Bus Station

  2. Gold Souq Bus Station External

  3. Ghubaiba Bus Station · 3

  4. Department of Ports & Customs

  5. Al Mina Road

  6. Capital Hotel

  7. Hudheiba

  8. Etihad Museum

9.

  3. Beach Center

  9. Rashid Bin Bakhait Masjid

  10. Majlis Al Ghoreifa

  11. Saeed Majid Bil Yoha Mosque

  14. Manara, Enoc

  15. Abu Manara Masjid

  20. Jumeirah Beach Residence 2 Seaside

  21. Ibn Battuta Bus Station · 1

Bus 8 Station Overview

Al Baraha Bus Station

Al Baraha Bus Station is a key transit point located in the bustling Al Baraha neighborhood. Serving as a major hub for local and intercity bus routes, it offers passengers easy access to surrounding areas and key city destinations. The station is well-equipped with amenities such as seating areas, ticket counters, and restrooms, ensuring a comfortable experience for travelers.

Ibn Battuta Bus Station · 1

Ibn Battuta Bus Station is strategically positioned near the famous Ibn Battuta Mall, providing a convenient link for shoppers, commuters, and tourists alike. As a central hub in the Jebel Ali area, it connects passengers to various parts of Dubai. The station is modern and spacious, offering facilities such as digital information screens, ample seating, and easy connections to the metro and other bus routes.

Tourist Destination Along the Way

The Bus 8 route in Dubai passes by several notable tourist attractions and destinations. Here are some highlights:

  1. Etihad Museum: A cultural and historical museum dedicated to the history of the United Arab Emirates.

  2. Jumeirah Beach Residence (JBR): A popular waterfront community with numerous shops, restaurants, and beach access.

  3. Wild Wadi Waterpark: A major water park offering a range of slides and attractions.

4.

  1. Madinat Jumeira: A resort complex with traditional Arabian architecture, waterways, and shopping options.

6.

Journey Experience

The 8 bus route from Al Baraha Bus Station to Ibn Battuta Bus Station offers a long but engaging journey through some of Dubai’s most dynamic areas.

The journey concludes at Ibn Battuta Bus Station, near the famous Ibn Battuta Mall, celebrated for its architectural beauty and themed sections inspired by the travels of the famous explorer. This ride provides a great mix of cultural and modern sights, making the lengthy trip both visually stimulating and rewarding.

Travelling with Careem

With the Careem app, you can travel to Ibn Battuta Bus Station · 1, the final stop on the Bus 8 route starting from Al Baraha Bus Station. The estimated fare for this journey ranges from AED 105 to AED 127. This convenient option allows you to easily reach one of Dubai’s major transport hubs, ensuring a comfortable ride to your destination. The Careem app also provides real-time updates and fare estimates to help you plan your trip effectively.

In conclusion, Bus 8 is a well-connected and reliable service that covers essential parts of Dubai, from Al Baraha Bus Station to Ibn Battuta Bus Station. With frequent stops, convenient timings, and affordable pricing, it is a great option for those looking to explore the city or commute to work. For a smooth journey, using the RTA Dubai app is advised for the latest updates on bus timings and routes.
